metadata.description: Official ForgePlan plugin marketplace for Claude Code — UX, frontend, workflow, and developer tools

plugins.name: laws-of-ux
plugins.description: 30 Laws of UX applied to frontend code review. Analyzes HTML/CSS/JS/React/Vue against UX principles with actionable recommendations.

plugins.name: forgeplan-workflow
plugins.description: Structured engineering workflow for forgeplan users. Provides forge-cycle (full dev cycle), forge-audit (multi-expert review), methodology knowledge base, and quality gate hooks.

plugins.name: dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Universal engineering toolkit: multi-expert audit, wave-based sprints, session context recall, and safety hooks. Works with any project and language.
